title: Employee Orders
description: Find each employee's name along with the product they ordered. Return employee name and product name only.
reference_query: SELECT employees.name, orders.product FROM employees INNER JOIN orders ON employees.id = orders.employee_id
hints: Use JOIN (or INNER JOIN) to combine two tables.
The ON clause specifies which columns to match — employees.id = orders.employee_id.
You can use table aliases: FROM employees e JOIN orders o ON e.id = o.employee_id
explanation: INNER JOIN returns only rows where the join condition matches in BOTH tables. Rows without a match are excluded.
